title: Charred, Fluffy American Bread Toast
description: A nostalgic American dish featuring double-rise bread, charred to perfection and infused with the tanginess of pickle juice.
instructions: Slice the double-rise bread into 1-inch thick slices and place on a baking sheet.
Drizzle the pickle juice over the bread slices, making sure each slice is coated.
Dot the top of each bread slice with unsalted butter.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Bake the bread in the preheated oven for 12-15 minutes, or until golden brown and charred.
Remove the bread from the oven and let cool for 2-3 minutes.
Flip the bread slices over and return to the oven for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until the other side is also charred.
Remove the bread from the oven and let cool completely on a wire rack.
Serve the charred, fluffy American bread toast warm, or at room temperature.
